title: This Insider Just Bought 21,000 Shares of Evertec for $491,000 After a 36% Drop
author: Sarah Sidlow
description: Evertec Executive Vice President Miguel Vizcarrondo purchased 21,000 shares for $491,000 on May 11, 2026, marking his first open-market buy in two years after a 36% share price decline. The purchase follows strong Q1 2026 earnings with 8% revenue growth and strategic acquisitions in Latin America, suggesting insider confidence in the company's recovery and growth prospects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Insider executive purchased significant shares ($491,000) after a 36% decline, reversing a two-year selling pattern. This signals insider confidence. Additionally, the company reported strong Q1 earnings with 8% YoY revenue growth, beat consensus estimates, and executed strategic acquisitions (Dimensa, Tecnobank) and partnerships (Transbank), indicating solid business momentum and growth potential in the Latin American fintech market.

Mentioned as a comparable Latin American fintech investment opportunity and strategic partner with Evertec since 2019. However, the article notes it was down ~35% YoY as of May 11, similar to Evertec, suggesting market headwinds affecting the sector rather than company-specific issues.
Referenced as a successful Latin American fintech investment opportunity demonstrating market potential, but no specific company performance or news is discussed in the article.

title: Evertec (EVTC) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Evertec (EVTC) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2024, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Evertec (EVTC) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Evertec (EVTC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.46% and 2.28%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Compared to Estimates, Evertec (EVTC) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: The headline numbers for Evertec (EVTC) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended December 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About Evertec (EVTC) Q4 Earnings
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Beyond analysts' top -and-bottom-line estimates for Evertec (EVTC), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended December 2023.
